info.title: Lumera Cosmos EVM JSON-RPC API
info.description: Auto-generated method catalog from Cosmos EVM JSON-RPC namespace implementations.

methods.name: debug_blockProfile
methods.description: BlockProfile turns on goroutine profiling for nsec seconds and writes profile data to file. It uses a profile rate of 1 for most accurate information. If a different rate is desired, set the rate and write the profile manually.

params.name: file
params.description: Filesystem path on the node where the pprof block-contention profile will be written. Existing files are overwritten.

params.name: nsec
params.description: Sampling duration in seconds. Profiling runs for this long, then the buffer is flushed to `file`.

result.name: result
result.description: No return value

examples.name: capture-block-profile
examples.summary: Starts block profiling for 5 seconds and writes to a pprof file.

methods.name: debug_cpuProfile
methods.description: CpuProfile turns on CPU profiling for nsec seconds and writes profile data to file.

params.name: file
params.description: Filesystem path on the node where the pprof CPU profile will be written. Existing files are overwritten.

params.name: nsec
params.description: Profiling duration in seconds. CPU sampling runs for this long before the file is written.

result.name: result
result.description: No return value

examples.name: capture-cpu-profile
examples.summary: Captures CPU profile for 10 seconds.

methods.name: debug_freeOSMemory
methods.description: FreeOSMemory forces a garbage collection.

result.name: result
result.description: No return value

examples.name: trigger-gc-memory-release
examples.summary: Hints runtime to return memory to the OS.

methods.name: debug_gcStats
methods.description: GcStats returns GC statistics.

result.name: result
result.description: Go runtime garbage-collector statistics: last/2nd-last GC times, total pause durations, pause histogram, and pause-end timestamps.

examples.name: gc-stats
examples.summary: Returns current Go GC statistics.

methods.name: debug_getBlockRlp
methods.description: GetBlockRlp retrieves the RLP encoded for of a single block.

params.name: number
params.description: Block height to fetch. Returns the RLP-encoded bytes of that block.

result.name: result
result.description: RLP-encoded bytes of the requested block (hex).

examples.name: block-rlp-by-height
examples.summary: Returns RLP-encoded Ethereum block bytes.

methods.name: debug_getHeaderRlp
methods.description: GetHeaderRlp retrieves the RLP encoded for of a single header.

params.name: number
params.description: Block height to fetch. Returns the RLP-encoded bytes of that header.

result.name: result
result.description: RLP-encoded bytes of the requested header (hex).

examples.name: header-rlp-by-height
examples.summary: Returns RLP-encoded Ethereum header bytes.

methods.name: debug_getRawBlock
methods.description: GetRawBlock retrieves the RLP-encoded block by block number or hash.

params.name: blockNrOrHash
params.description: Block height tag (hex or `latest`/`earliest`/`pending`/`safe`/`finalized`) or block hash to fetch as raw RLP.

schema.description: Block number (hex) or block hash (0x-prefixed 32-byte hex), optionally with requireCanonical flag

result.name: result
result.description: RLP-encoded bytes of the requested block (hex). Equivalent to `debug_getBlockRlp`.

examples.name: raw-block-latest
examples.summary: Returns RLP bytes for the latest block.

methods.name: debug_goTrace
methods.description: GoTrace turns on tracing for nsec seconds and writes trace data to file.

params.name: file
params.description: Filesystem path on the node where the Go execution trace will be written (consume with `go tool trace`).

params.name: nsec
params.description: Trace capture duration in seconds.

result.name: result
result.description: No return value

examples.name: capture-go-trace
examples.summary: Starts Go execution trace and writes to file for 3 seconds.

methods.name: debug_intermediateRoots
methods.description: IntermediateRoots executes a block, and returns a list of intermediate roots: the stateroot after each transaction.

params.name: hash
params.description: Hash of the block to re-execute. The endpoint returns the intermediate state roots after each transaction.

params.name: config
params.description: Optional tracer configuration (tracer name, timeout, reexec depth, state overrides). Pass null for defaults.

debug.description: If true, tracer-side diagnostic output is included when the trace ends. Intended for tracer development, not normal use.

disableStack.description: If true, EVM stack snapshots are omitted from the trace output. Reduces payload size significantly.

disableStorage.description: If true, storage-slot reads/writes are omitted from the trace output. Reduces payload size and avoids storage-trie lookups.

enableMemory.description: If true, the EVM memory snapshot is included at each captured step. Significantly increases payload size.

enableReturnData.description: If true, the EVM RETURN/REVERT data buffer is included at each captured step.

limit.description: Maximum number of trace steps to retain (oldest steps are dropped past the cap). 0 means unlimited.

overrides.description: Optional chain-config overrides applied only to this trace — lets you simulate execution under future hard-fork rules without forking the chain.

arrow_glacier_block.description: Block height of the Arrow Glacier fork — EIP-4345 difficulty-bomb delay. Cosmetic on PoS chains; included for cross-chain trace compatibility.

berlin_block.description: Block height of the Berlin fork (EIP-2929 cold/warm access costs, EIP-2930 optional access lists). `null` = never.

byzantium_block.description: Block height of the Byzantium fork (REVERT, RETURNDATA, modexp/bn256 precompiles). `null` = never; `"0"` = active from genesis.

cancun_time.description: Unix timestamp at which the Cancun fork activates (EIP-4844 blob txs, EIP-1153 transient storage, EIP-5656 MCOPY). `null` = never.

chain_id.description: EIP-155 chain identifier baked into transaction signatures. On Lumera the EVM chain ID is `76857769`.

constantinople_block.description: Block height of the Constantinople fork (CREATE2, SHL/SHR/SAR, EXTCODEHASH). `null` = never; `"0"` = active from genesis.

dao_fork_block.description: Block height of the TheDAO hard-fork. `null` to disable. Lumera does not replay Ethereum's DAO state changes; this controls only fork-rule activation in EVM simulation.

dao_fork_support.description: Whether this node sides with the DAO hard-fork (`true`) or with the original chain (`false`). Affects header-validity checks during `dao_fork_block`.

decimals.description: Decimal precision of the configured `denom`. Lumera uses 18 decimals on the EVM side (`alume`) bridged to 6 decimals (`ulume`) via the precisebank module.

denom.description: Bank denomination used as the EVM's native gas/value token. On Lumera this is `alume` (the 18-decimal representation of `ulume`).

eip150_block.description: Block height activating EIP-150 (gas-cost repricing of IO-heavy opcodes). `null` = never; `"0"` = active from genesis.

eip155_block.description: Block height activating EIP-155 (chain-ID-bound signing, replay-attack protection). `null` = never.

eip158_block.description: Block height activating EIP-158 (state-clearing of empty accounts). `null` = never.

gray_glacier_block.description: Block height of the Gray Glacier fork — EIP-5133 difficulty-bomb delay. Cosmetic on PoS chains; included for cross-chain trace compatibility.

homestead_block.description: Block height at which the Homestead hard fork activates. `null` = never; `"0"` = already active from genesis.

istanbul_block.description: Block height of the Istanbul fork (CHAINID, SELFBALANCE, gas repricing — EIP-1344/1884/2200). `null` = never.

london_block.description: Block height of the London fork (EIP-1559 dynamic base fee, EIP-3198 BASEFEE opcode, EIP-3529 refund cap). `null` = never.

merge_netsplit_block.description: Virtual block height marking the Paris/Merge transition to proof-of-stake. Used as a network-split sentinel; no consensus rules change at this height on its own.

muir_glacier_block.description: Block height of the Muir Glacier fork — EIP-2384 difficulty-bomb delay. Cosmetic on PoS chains like Lumera; primarily relevant for cross-chain trace fidelity.

osaka_time.description: Unix timestamp at which the Osaka/Fusaka fork activates. `null` = never.

petersburg_block.description: Block height of the Petersburg fork (Constantinople minus EIP-1283 reentrancy issue). `null` reuses the Constantinople block.

prague_time.description: Unix timestamp at which the Prague/Pectra fork activates (EIP-7702 set-code authorizations, EIP-2537 BLS12-381 precompiles, etc.). `null` = never.

shanghai_time.description: Unix timestamp at which the Shanghai fork activates (EIP-3855 PUSH0, EIP-3651 warm coinbase, EIP-4895 withdrawals). `null` = never; `"0"` = active from genesis.

verkle_time.description: Unix timestamp at which a Verkle-trees transition activates. `null` = never; on Lumera this is typically `null`.

reexec.description: How many ancestor blocks the node may re-execute to reconstruct the requested pre-state. Higher values allow tracing further back at the cost of CPU.

timeout.description: Maximum wall-clock duration for the trace, e.g. `"5s"`, `"500ms"`. Default 5s. Applies mainly to JavaScript tracers.

tracer.description: Name of a built-in tracer (e.g. `callTracer`, `prestateTracer`, `4byteTracer`) or a JavaScript tracer source string. Omit to use the default opcode tracer.

tracerConfig.description: Tracer-specific JSON configuration, passed through to the named `tracer`. Shape depends on the tracer (e.g. `{ "withLog": true }` for `callTracer`).

result.name: result
result.description: Ordered list of intermediate state roots — one per transaction in the block — produced while re-executing it. Index N is the root after applying tx N.

examples.name: intermediate-state-roots
examples.summary: Returns intermediate state roots while replaying tx execution.

methods.name: debug_memStats
methods.description: MemStats returns detailed runtime memory statistics.

result.name: result
result.description: Go runtime memory-allocator statistics: heap size, allocation counts, GC overhead, and span-class breakdown.

BySize.description: Go type: [61]struct { Size uint32; Mallocs uint64; Frees uint64 }

items.x-go-type: struct { Size uint32; Mallocs uint64; Frees uint64 }

BySize.x-go-type: [61]struct { Size uint32; Mallocs uint64; Frees uint64 }

examples.name: memory-stats
examples.summary: Returns runtime memory statistics.

methods.name: debug_mutexProfile
methods.description: MutexProfile turns on mutex profiling for nsec seconds and writes profile data to file. It uses a profile rate of 1 for most accurate information. If a different rate is desired, set the rate and write the profile manually.

params.name: file
params.description: Filesystem path on the node where the pprof mutex-contention profile will be written.

params.name: nsec
params.description: Sampling duration in seconds.

result.name: result
result.description: No return value

examples.name: capture-mutex-profile
examples.summary: Captures mutex contention profile.

methods.name: debug_printBlock
methods.description: PrintBlock retrieves a block and returns its pretty printed form.

params.name: number
params.description: Block height to dump. Returns a human-readable representation of the block.

result.name: result
result.description: Human-readable string dump of the block (header fields, transactions, uncles).

examples.name: print-block
examples.summary: Returns pretty-printed block dump by number.

methods.name: debug_setBlockProfileRate
methods.description: SetBlockProfileRate sets the rate of goroutine block profile data collection. rate 0 disables block profiling.

params.name: rate
params.description: Block-profile sampling rate. 0 disables profiling; 1 samples every blocking event; higher values sample 1-in-N.

result.name: result
result.description: No return value

examples.name: set-block-rate
examples.summary: Enables block profiling with sample rate 1.

methods.name: debug_setGCPercent
methods.description: SetGCPercent sets the garbage collection target percentage. It returns the previous setting. A negative value disables GC.

params.name: v
params.description: New `GOGC` value as a percentage. Returns the previous setting. Negative values disable GC.

result.name: result
result.description: Previous `GOGC` value before this call applied the new one.

examples.name: set-gc-percent
examples.summary: Sets GOGC threshold and returns previous value.

methods.name: debug_setMutexProfileFraction
methods.description: SetMutexProfileFraction sets the rate of mutex profiling.

params.name: rate
params.description: Mutex-profile sampling fraction. 0 disables; N samples 1-in-N contention events.

result.name: result
result.description: No return value

examples.name: set-mutex-fraction
examples.summary: Sets mutex profiling fraction to 1.

methods.name: debug_stacks
methods.description: Stacks returns a printed representation of the stacks of all goroutines.

result.name: result
result.description: All goroutine stack traces from the running node, formatted as a single text blob (same shape as `go tool pprof`'s goroutine dump).

examples.name: goroutine-stacks
examples.summary: Returns current goroutine stack dump.

methods.name: debug_startCPUProfile
methods.description: StartCPUProfile turns on CPU profiling, writing to the given file.

params.name: file
params.description: Filesystem path that CPU profile samples will stream to until `debug_stopCPUProfile` is called.

result.name: result
result.description: No return value

examples.name: start-cpu-profile
examples.summary: Starts CPU profiling until debug_stopCPUProfile.

methods.name: debug_startGoTrace
methods.description: StartGoTrace turns on tracing, writing to the given file.

params.name: file
params.description: Filesystem path that Go execution trace events will stream to until `debug_stopGoTrace` is called.

result.name: result
result.description: No return value

examples.name: start-go-trace
examples.summary: Starts Go tracing until debug_stopGoTrace.

methods.name: debug_stopCPUProfile
methods.description: StopCPUProfile stops an ongoing CPU profile.

result.name: result
result.description: No return value

examples.name: stop-cpu-profile
examples.summary: Stops active CPU profile and flushes output.

methods.name: debug_stopGoTrace
methods.description: StopGoTrace stops an ongoing trace.

result.name: result
result.description: No return value

examples.name: stop-go-trace

methods.description: NewFilter creates a new filter and returns the filter id. It can be used to retrieve logs when the state changes. This method cannot be used to fetch logs that are already stored in the state. Default criteria for the from and to block are "latest". Using "latest" as block number will return logs for mined blocks. Using "pending" as block number returns logs for not yet mined (pending) blocks. In case logs are removed (chain reorg) previously returned logs are returned again but with the removed property set to true. In case "fromBlock" > "toBlock" an error is returned. https://github.com/ethereum/wiki/wiki/JSON-RPC#eth_newfilter

params.name: criteria
params.description: Filter criteria: `fromBlock`/`toBlock`, optional `address`(es), optional `topics`. Returns a filter ID poll-able via `eth_getFilterChanges`.

methods.name: personal_ecRecover
methods.description: EcRecover returns the address for the account that was used to create the signature. Note, this function is compatible with eth_sign and personal_sign. As such it recovers the address of: hash = keccak256("\x19Ethereum Signed Message:\n"${message length}${message}) addr = ecrecover(hash, signature) Note, the signature must conform to the secp256k1 curve R, S and V values, where the V value must be 27 or 28 for legacy reasons. https://github.com/ethereum/go-ethereum/wiki/Management-APIs#personal_ecRecove

params.name: data
params.description: Original data that was signed via `personal_sign` (Ethereum signed-message prefix is reapplied during recovery).

params.name: sig
params.description: 65-byte signature (`r||s||v`) produced by `personal_sign`.

result.name: result
result.description: Address that produced the signature, recovered using the Ethereum signed-message prefix.

examples.name: recover-address
examples.summary: Recovers signer from personal_sign-style payload/signature.

methods.name: personal_sendTransaction
methods.description: SendTransaction will create a transaction from the given arguments and tries to sign it with the key associated with args.To. If the given password isn't able to decrypt the key it fails.

params.name: args
params.description: Transaction object to sign and submit using a temporarily-unlocked keystore account.

schema.description: Arguments for message calls and transaction submission, using Ethereum JSON-RPC hex encoding. Use either legacy `gasPrice` or EIP-1559 fee fields. If you provide blob sidecar fields, provide `blobs`, `commitments`, and `proofs` together.

chainId.description: Chain ID this authorization is valid for.

nonce.description: Authorization nonce encoded as a hex uint64.

yParity.description: Signature y-parity encoded as a hex uint64.

items.description: EIP-4844 blob payload encoded as 0x-prefixed hex (131072 bytes).

chainId.description: Chain ID to sign against. If set, it must match the node chain ID.

items.description: EIP-4844 KZG commitment encoded as 0x-prefixed hex (48 bytes).

data.description: Legacy calldata field kept for backwards compatibility. Prefer `input`.

gas.description: Gas limit to use. If omitted, the node may estimate it.

gasPrice.description: Legacy gas price. Do not combine with EIP-1559 fee fields.

input.description: Preferred calldata field for contract calls and deployments.

maxFeePerBlobGas.description: EIP-4844 maximum fee per blob gas.

maxFeePerGas.description: EIP-1559 maximum total fee per gas.

maxPriorityFeePerGas.description: EIP-1559 maximum priority fee per gas.

nonce.description: Explicit sender nonce.

items.description: EIP-4844 KZG proof encoded as 0x-prefixed hex (48 bytes).

to.description: Recipient address. Omit for contract creation.

params.name: password
params.description: Passphrase of the sender's keystore account; used to unlock just for this call.

result.name: result
result.description: Hash of the submitted transaction.

examples.summary: Signs and broadcasts a transaction using personal namespace.

methods.name: personal_sign
methods.description: Sign calculates an Ethereum ECDSA signature for: keccak256("\x19Ethereum Signed Message:\n" + len(message) + message)) Note, the produced signature conforms to the secp256k1 curve R, S and V values, where the V value will be 27 or 28 for legacy reasons. The key used to calculate the signature is decrypted with the given password. https://github.com/ethereum/go-ethereum/wiki/Management-APIs#personal_sign

result.name: result
